Headline: #21 Cermak Temporary Westbound Reroute near 25th/Michigan
ShortDescription: Westbound 21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, Michigan, 31st, King Dr. and over normal route: due to police activity near 25th/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, Michigan, 31st, King Dr. and over normal route: due to police activity near 25th/Michigan.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
